offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 orders/month, inaccurate inventory levels cause stockouts and missed sales opportunities. We provide an inventory forecasting tool instead of manual tracking using spreadsheets.
problem: Inaccurate inventory levels lead to stockouts and missed sales opportunities.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Indie Hackers discussions on inventory management
DM outreach to Etsy sellers with demo video
Engage in Etsy seller Facebook groups
try_it: Let users try manual inventory entry and basic forecasting algorithms on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a landing page with one-liner and CTA
Develop a short demo video of the tool
Share weekly updates in relevant forums
automation_simplification_ideas: CSV import for existing inventory data
Streamline onboarding steps for new users
